name: Prompt Request
about: Request an AI prompt to solve a specific engineering problem
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: 'enhancement, help-wanted'
assignees: ''

---

## Desired Outcome
What kind of problem are you trying to solve using an AI assistant? (e.g., "I need a prompt that can refactor a monolithic Express.js app into serverless functions").

## Tool Preference
Do you need this for a specific tool (Cursor, Windsurf, Trae, ChatGPT etc.), or is any general platform fine?

## Complexity Letdowns
What prompts have you already tried that *didn't* work? What were their failure modes?
